ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file format for the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document file in MB */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the document was published */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the document */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the document */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document (e.g., policy, strategy, infrastructure) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the document expires */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the document is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent department (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the author belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_departments" (
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the department in relation to the document (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the version was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, manager, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "parent_tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent tag (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tag_associations" (
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the tag in relation to the document (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_ratings_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in history */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_history_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the document has been downloaded */,
  "last_download_date" TEXT /* Date of the last download */,
  "total_size_downloaded" REAL /* Total size of the document downloaded (in MB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_downloads_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the document has been shared */,
  "last_share_date" TEXT /* Date of the last share */,
  "share_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the document was shared (e.g., email, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_shares_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the document has been viewed */,
  "last_view_date" TEXT /* Date of the last view */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of time the document has been viewed (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_views_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
